name: Google
description: Google is a technology company providing search, advertising, cloud computing, Android, Workspace, and consumer hardware.

years.notes: Catull BQ serif wordmark refined May 2010 — slightly more orange 'o' and reduced drop shadow versus the 1999 Kedar mark. Gradients flattened to mid-stop solid colors; wordmark scaled to fit 24×24 viewBox (text renders very small at icon sizes — cataloging tradeoff).

Final flat Catull serif wordmark (Sep 2013 – Aug 2015) — shadows removed, slightly flatter colors before the 2015 Product Sans rebrand. Gradients flattened to mid-stop solid colors; wordmark scaled to fit 24×24 viewBox.

notes: Pre-2010 wordmarks (1998 Baskerville 'Google!' by Sergey Brin, 1999 Ruth Kedar Catull serif) were not added: no authoritative true-vector SVG exists on Wikimedia Commons, Logopedia, or archive.org — only raster PNGs (and SVG containers wrapping embedded PNGs from third-party logo sites, which do not qualify as true vectors). Per the no-invent rule, these millésimes were skipped.
